title: Suspect Links Status Bar
changes: Server: GET /api/suspect-links/stats endpoint with project=all support
Server: Graceful handling when suspect_links table missing (returns zeros)
Client: Suspect status bar in kanban header with suspect/cleared/accepted_risk counts
Client: Clearance progress bar with percentage
Client: Color palette — suspect=#ef4444 (red), cleared=#22c55e (green), accepted_risk=#f59e0b (amber)
Client: Bar hidden when total=0, loaded on init and each poll
